name: PipelineTerraformInstaller
description: Find in cache or download a specific version of Terraform and prepend it to the PATH
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: binary
inputs.label: Binary
inputs.helpMarkDown: Which IaC binary to install: Terraform (HashiCorp) or OpenTofu.

inputs.name: terraformVersion
inputs.label: Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: The version to install. Use 'latest' to install the current latest release. Applies to both Terraform and OpenTofu.

inputs.name: downloadSource
inputs.label: Download source
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to download the Terraform binary from. OpenTofu always downloads from GitHub releases.

inputs.name: registryUrl
inputs.label: Registry base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of your terraform-registry-backend instance. Must use HTTPS. Example: https://registry.example.com

inputs.name: registryMirrorName
inputs.label: Mirror configuration name
inputs.helpMarkDown: The mirror configuration name in your registry backend. This is the {name} path segment in /terraform/binaries/{name}/...

inputs.name: mirrorBaseUrl
inputs.label: Mirror base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of your binary mirror. Must use HTTPS. Must serve files at the same path structure as releases.hashicorp.com/terraform. Example: https://artifacts.example.com/hashicorp/terraform

inputs.name: requireGpgSignature
inputs.label: Require GPG signature verification
inputs.visibleRule: binary = terraform && downloadSource = hashicorp || binary = terraform && downloadSource = mirror
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, fail if the GPG signature file is unavailable. Defaults to true for HashiCorp downloads. Disable for mirrors that do not serve .sig files.

inputs.name: requireCosignVerification
inputs.label: Require cosign signature verification
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, fail if cosign is not available on the agent or the signature cannot be verified. When disabled (default), cosign verification is attempted but skipped if cosign is not installed.

outputVariables.name: terraformLocation
outputVariables.description: The location of the terraform binary that was installed on the agent.

outputVariables.name: terraformDownloadedFrom
outputVariables.description: The source from which terraform was downloaded: 'hashicorp', 'registry:<url>', or 'mirror:<url>'.

messages.InputVersionNotValidSemanticVersion: Input version %s is not a valid semantic version
messages.TerraformDownloadFailed: Failed to download binary from url %s. Error: %s
messages.TerraformVersionNotFound: Unable to get latest version from source, using fallback version
messages.GettingLatestOpenTofuVersion: Getting latest OpenTofu version from GitHub releases.
messages.InsecureUrlRejected: Insecure URL rejected: %s. Only HTTPS URLs are allowed.
messages.RegistryRequestFailed: Registry request failed for %s. HTTP status: %s
messages.ResolvingLatestFromRegistry: Resolving latest Terraform version from registry: %s
